sizing_rule.note: Risk 1% per trade but scale position size inversely to market volatility (ATR/Close). Tighter stops in low volatility, smaller positions in high volatility. Max drawdown tolerance is 15% of account equity.

source_rule_text: A trader should adjust position size based on the tightness of their stop loss and market volatility to avoid excessive drawdown while optimizing reward-to-risk ratios, rather than using a fixed equal-units model.
